directory_structure: core/ composer/ composer.test.ts index.ts naming.ts registry/ templates/ atomic.ts feature-sliced.ts flat.ts modular.ts index.ts loader.test.ts loader.ts renderer/ __snapshots__/ renderer.test.ts.snap markdown-renderer.ts prompt-renderer.ts renderer.test.ts shared/ pattern-state.ts writer/ index.ts schema/ policy.schema.ts ui/ app.tsx bin.ts
